title: Sparganophorus vaillantii
taxonomy: Sparganophorus vaillantii is classified within the family Zosterophyllaceae, which is a group of ancient, non-vascular plants. It is placed in the genus Sparganophorus, a monotypic genus. This species is part of the division Tracheophyta, which includes vascular plants. The classification of Sparganophorus vaillantii is further refined to the class Rhyniopsida, an order of early vascular plants. The specific classification of Sparganophorus vaillantii helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
